title: MC-Escape: Cobblemon [Fabric]
description: This modpack is built around Cobblemon with a little bit of the Create mixed in. There are also some small storage & decoration mods. A majority of the mods are for performance and QOL, but don’t add new items, blocks, or entities.
body:
This modpack is built around Cobblemon with a little bit of the Create mixed in. There are also multiple add-on mods for both the Cobblemon & Create mod. There are some other QOL & minor additions like Travelers Backpack, Tom's Simple Storage, Extended Drawers, Reinforced Barrels, & Another furniture mod.

Below I have listed out the mods included in this modpack grouped up into seven catagories. Each catagory is further grouped based on whether they are required on both the server & client, client only, or server only. Additionally, most (all I think...) of the library mods have their dependent mods listed. 

List of Mods categorized:

    General & QOL mods (adds blocks, items, or entities):
        server & client:
            another_furniture-fabric-1.20.1-3.0.1
            CharcoalBlock-1.20.1-0.1
            coffins-1.3.0+1.20.1
